nodes.headline: Saudi PIF announces plans for up to 8 subsidiary IPOs in 2026 and unveils shift to ecosystem integration at Private Sector Forum.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion amid existing $100B debt load.
DOJ continues Epstein files releases with removals for victim protection and new publications totaling nearly 3.5 million pages as of early March 2026.
Ghislaine Maxwell prepares commutation application to Trump in exchange for Epstein-related testimony amid Democratic opposition.
Saudi PIF soft-launches 2026-2030 strategy shifting focus to industry, minerals, AI, and tourism while scaling back mega-projects like The Line.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion amid concerns over OpenAI exposure and existing debt.

DOJ published over 3 million additional pages of Epstein files on March 7, 2026, in compliance with the Epstein Files Transparency Act, totaling nearly 3.5 million pages including 2,000 videos and 180,000 images.[1][3]
Ghislaine Maxwell's attorney publicly appealed for presidential clemency in exchange for testimony, prompting White House denial of priority and Senate opposition resolution.

US and Israel continue massive airstrikes on Iran through March 7, 2026, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and targeting nuclear sites and leadership; Iran retaliates with drone and missile strikes on US embassies and Gulf targets.
Saudi PIF unveils revised 2026-2030 strategy focusing on industry, AI, mining, and tourism while scaling back mega-projects.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion amid debt scrutiny.
DOJ continues removing and reviewing Epstein files amid criticism, with site last updated March 7, 2026.
Ghislaine Maxwell invoked Fifth Amendment in House Oversight deposition while her attorney publicly appealed for Trump clemency in exchange for testimony.
US and Israel conducted extensive airstrikes on Iranian nuclear, missile, and leadership targets through March 3, 2026, under joint campaign including Operation Epic Fury.
Saudi PIF soft-launches 2026-2030 strategy at Riyadh forum, shifting focus to AI, industry, minerals, and tourism while scaling back mega-projects.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion amid high debt scrutiny.
DOJ released over 1,000 additional Epstein files on March 5, 2026, including more than a dozen related to Trump allegations, with the Epstein Library last updated March 7, 2026[3][4].
Ghislaine Maxwell's attorney publicly appeals for presidential clemency in exchange for testimony on Epstein network, but White House states it is not a priority.
US and Israel conducted massive airstrikes on over 3,300 Iranian military, nuclear, and leadership targets since February 28, 2026, under joint operations including Operation Epic Fury.
Saudi PIF unveiled revised 2026-2030 strategy focusing on industry, minerals, AI, and tourism while scaling back mega-projects.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion.
DOJ released additional Epstein files including over 1,000 pages related to Trump allegations on March 5-9, 2026, updating the public database.
Ghislaine Maxwell invoked Fifth Amendment in House Oversight deposition but offered testimony exonerating Trump and Clinton in exchange for clemency from President Trump.
Operation Epic Fury enters day 11 with US strikes intensifying on Iranian military, nuclear, and internal security targets amid ongoing Iranian retaliatory drone and missile attacks on Gulf states.
Saudi PIF announced its 2026-2030 strategy at the PIF Private Sector Forum in Riyadh, shifting from sector building to growth acceleration with SAR 70 billion in new opportunities.
Oracle reports Q3 FY2026 earnings with $17.2B revenue and $553B RPO amid $100B+ debt and $30B financing raised.
DOJ released previously withheld FBI 302 documents from Epstein files alleging sexual assault by Trump on March 10, 2026.
Ghislaine Maxwell refused to testify before House Oversight Committee unless granted clemency by President Trump, invoking Fifth Amendment in February 2026 hearing.[1][2]
Saudi PIF soft-launched its 2026-2030 strategy on March 9, 2026, shifting focus to industry, minerals, AI, and tourism while scaling back mega projects.
Oracle announced $45-50B equity and debt financing plan for 2026 to fund cloud infrastructure expansion amid debt scrutiny and bondholder lawsuit.
DOJ released previously withheld FBI documents from Epstein files alleging sexual assault by Trump on March 10, 2026.
Ghislaine Maxwell invoked Fifth Amendment in February 2026 House Oversight deposition, conditioning testimony on Trump clemency which lawmakers rejected.[1][2][5]
US conducted its most intense day of airstrikes on Iran on March 10, 2026, targeting naval vessels and internal security forces amid ongoing Iranian retaliation.
Saudi PIF announced new 2026-2030 strategy at Riyadh forum, pivoting to industrial execution, AI, minerals, and private sector partnerships worth SAR 70 billion.
Oracle announced $45-50B financing plan for 2026 debt needs, but stock dropped over 12% amid OpenAI exposure concerns after Nvidia-OpenAI deal tweet.
DOJ published over 3 million additional pages of Epstein files on March 11, 2026, in compliance with the Epstein Files Transparency Act, including uncorroborated allegations against Trump.
Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic remains near standstill for over a week, with only Iran-linked vessels transiting amid ongoing conflict.
Saudi PIF unveils revised 2026-2030 strategy, pivoting to industry, minerals, AI, and tourism amid low oil prices, scaling back mega-projects like The Line.

Israel conducts ongoing airstrikes on Iran and Hezbollah targets amid full-scale war started February 28, 2026, destroying hundreds of Iranian missile launchers and striking 60 Hezbollah sites in Lebanon on March 3.
DOJ released three previously withheld 2019 FBI 302 reports alleging Trump abused a minor, amid accusations of improper withholding.
AVAIO Digital announced $6B initial investment in AI-ready data center hub in Pulaski County, Arkansas, on January 12, 2026, with construction starting Q1 2026.
Ghislaine Maxwell invoked Fifth Amendment in February 2026 House Oversight deposition, with attorney offering testimony conditional on Trump clemency; habeas corpus petition denied January 2026.
Strait of Hormuz commercial shipping near-total collapse with only Iran-linked vessels transiting; multiple merchant vessel strikes reported; Iranian mine deployment preparations underway
Saudi PIF soft-launches 2026-2030 strategy, shifting focus to AI, industry, minerals, and tourism while scaling back mega-projects like The Line amid fiscal pressures.

AVAIO Digital announced $6B initial investment for AI-ready data center campus in Pulaski County, Arkansas, on January 12, 2026, with construction starting Q1 2026.
